title: Use of VIP lounges at airports 'just the way it is', says Latvian President
summary_full: The travels of top state officials, including the President and Prime Minister, are subject to special security requirements and protocol, which also requires the use of VIP lounges at airports, according to Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs, speaking on the Latvian Radio programme "Krustpunktā".
